title: Law Association of Zambia and Ors v Attorney General and Ors (2025/CCZ/0029) [2025] ZMCC 29 (8 December 2025)
case_name: Law Association of Zambia and Ors v Attorney General and Ors
issue_tags: Order V r.6 and Rule 2 CCR
standing: identifiable legal interest, stake, or duty
persons and associations may appear in person
prematurity not fatal where no answer filed.
outcome_detail: Court granted joinder to two intended interested parties, holding standing rules broad and persons may appear in person
